summary: All 2 data_response tests passed. VAL-API-007 assertion confirmed: DataResponse enum variant exists in DaemonEvent with all required subtypes (TaskList, TaskDetail, ConfigValue, MemoryResults, CostData, DaemonHealth). JSON serialization round-trips preserve variant tag and inner data.
frictions: Note: The assertion specified 'cargo test -p swell-daemon -- data_response' but the tests actually reside in swell-core (test_data_response_in_daemon_event_serde, test_data_response_serde_roundtrip)

testsValidating.validates: DataResponse variant exists in DaemonEvent enum and serializes correctly
Serialization round-trips preserve variant tag and inner data
